description_for_human: Create real playable games by describing them to AI. The Raku Runtime executes .raku game definition files instantly.
description_for_model: RakuAI is a game engine that executes .raku files (JSON documents) describing games via C API calls. Use the schema at https://rakuai.com/schema.json to generate valid .raku files. The engine has 16 subsystems: Core, Scene, Renderer, XR, Physics, Audio, Animation, AI, SLM, Network, Voice, Input, UI, Assets, Editor, Scripting. All API functions follow raku_<module>_<action> naming. Files must include raku_format, metadata, initialization, calls, and shutdown sections.
